candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label from the income statement; matches total sales/revenue concept.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Not revenue; cost-related D&A line.
Not revenue; cost line.
Non-operating financial income, not sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Bottom-line earnings, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income - Attributable to Parent company's shareholders
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Cost-related depreciation, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Balance sheet working-capital item, not reported revenue line.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue line.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue line.
Balance sheet liability/accrual item, not revenue.
Liability, not recognized revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from candidates.

candidates.why: Direct cost line immediately below revenue; best match for cost of sales/COGS.
Subcomponent/alternate presentation for some years, but less complete than the main cost line.
Also a valid total COGS label, but appears duplicative of Cost of services sold.
Inventory component, not period cost of goods sold expense.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only a D&A component of COGS, not total COGS.
Only a depreciation component, not total COGS.

variables.notes: Chose the main direct cost line rather than the duplicate total-style label 'Cost of revenues/COGS'.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component above operating profit.
Subcomponent/alternate presentation; less preferable than the main row.
Clear SG&A overhead component above operating profit.
Subcomponent/alternate presentation; less preferable than the main row.
Dedicated R&D expense above operating profit; should also be included in XSGA_COMPONENTS when separate so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Subcomponent/alternate presentation; less preferable than the main row.
Additional operating overhead bucket above operating profit; acceptable when no explicit SG&A total exists.
Looks like duplicate/secondary label with sparse values; less preferable.
Could represent overhead, but amount is extremely large relative to operating expenses and may overlap heavily with functional expense lines; avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset line, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A total row exists, so selected functional overhead buckets above operating profit. Included 'Research and Development Costs' as required so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best match.
Only a depreciation component of R&D, not total R&D expense.
Subcomponent/alternate presentation; less preferable than the main R&D line.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists above operating profit and is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS to prevent omission.

candidates.why: Total finance-cost line, but less preferred because more granular recurring components exist and total may include FX/non-recurring items.
Primary recurring interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component that should be included with interest expense.
Contains 'Remaining value'; likely balancing/derived row and should be excluded.
Can represent recurring finance costs when separately disclosed; acceptable to include if no evidence it is purely one-off.
Not finance cost.
Not finance cost.
Not finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid when main line exists.
Equity line, not finance cost.
Equity line, not finance cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components over total 'Financial Expenses'. Excluded FX-related and 'Remaining value' rows to avoid non-interest items and balancing artifacts.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income - Attributable to Parent company's shareholders
candidates.why: Income statement OCI subtotal, not book equity.
Generic label and unpopulated; less precise than explicit parent equity line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best match because BE should exclude non-controlling interests.
Valid only if no parent-only equity line exists; here it would include NCI and risk double counting with MIB.
Balancing item, not preferred reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Total balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, but MIB should come from balance sheet if available.
Income statement allocation line, less preferred than balance sheet NCI.
Income statement comprehensive income allocation, less preferred than balance sheet.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Also valid balance sheet label, but 'Non-controlling interests' is the standard preferred wording.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet non-controlling interests line to pair with parent-only BE and avoid double counting.
